Precision in Every Step.

We provide full-cycle architectural and construction solutions, managing every stage of development — from strategic planning and technical documentation to construction and commissioning.

Precision in Every Step.

We provide full-cycle architectural and construction solutions, managing every stage of development — from strategic planning and technical documentation to construction and commissioning.

About UsPower Build Construction is a full-cycle architectural and construction bureau. We combine design, engineering solutions, and construction management into a unified system. Our goal is to create facilities that meet the highest standards of quality, functionality, and durability.

25+
Years of Excellence in Architecture & Design
500+
Projects Successfully Completed
98%
Client Retention Rate
15+
Countries with Our Projects

Our Services

We provide straightforward construction solutions without unnecessary complexity — fast, clear, and to the point.

Residential Construction

We build homes and residential complexes on time and within budget.

Commercial Construction

We deliver business facilities — from offices to retail spaces.

Renovation & Finishing

We carry out a full cycle of interior work with quality control.

Engineering Systems

We design and implement systems that operate stably and without overloads.

Our Approach

We do not overcomplicate processes — we structure them so the result is predictable.

Concept & Architecture

Development of the architectural concept and project documentation.

Design & Planning

Technical design, calculations, and process coordination.

Construction & Handover

Project execution with control of timelines, budget, and quality.

Project Gallery

Our completed projects are not visualizations — they are real facilities built by our team. Each one reflects our approach to quality, timelines, and details.

What We Offer

Our Services

01

Turnkey Construction

We create spaces that define the character of their surroundings.

02

Partial Construction

We work on individual stages — foundation, shell, finishing.

03

Building Reconstruction

We upgrade buildings to meet new requirements and load demands.

04

Technical Supervision

Monitoring and consulting at all stages of construction.

05

Project Optimization

Analysis and improvement of construction solution efficiency.

Our Location

Our office is located in Tashkent. We are open to cooperation with private and corporate clients.
